programs.title: The Baker's Son
programs.desc: The locals of Windwards Island always knows when talented baker Matt has fallen in love, his loaves taste delicious. So, when his bread stops tasting bland, is it due to the newcomer or friend Annie?

programs.title: Baking up Love
programs.desc: A confectionery store owner Lynn is convinced by the people of her town to enter the Great Pumpkin Bake Off. With the arrival of her unruly niece Julie, has she beaten of more than she can chew? (2021

programs.title: Baked With A Kiss
programs.desc: (2022) Culinary romance starring Jonathan Stoddard and Ansley Gordon. Renowned for her magical True Love pie, a baker accidentally serves one to a rude customer, who ends up falling in love with her.

programs.title: Two Chefs and A Wedding Cake
programs.desc: (2022) Foodie fun romance. Sparks fly for a food critic at her sister's wedding when she clashes with a chef infamous for banning reviewers from his restaurant. Can they turn rivalry into romance?

programs.title: The Way To The Heart
programs.desc: (2022) Romance with Meghan Heffern. When a big-city chef loses her spark, her boss insists she takes a break to find herself again. Will a visit to her hometown help her rediscover her passions?

programs.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programs.desc: (2023) Flavourful romance starring Laura Miyata and David Lafontaine. An NYC baker would love to land a cookbook deal. Will a dash of royalty and a spoonful of romance help fulfil her dream?
